core_theme: Git 2.55 发布：增量 MIDX 几何重打包、git history fixup、Linux inotify 支持、位图生成翻倍提速等十余个新特性
reader_takeaway: 了解 Git 2.55 的重要更新，特别是增量 MIDX 重打包对仓库维护的影响和 git history fixup 带来的工作流改善
summary_angle: Git 2.55 从底层 pack 管理到日常命令体验的全栈更新

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文「MIDX」节：几何增量重打包在大仓库中将位图生成从 612s 降到 294s
information_blocks.visual_idea: 层层叠加的 MIDX 链结构，底部大层稳定、顶部小层频繁更新

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文「git history fixup」节：暂存区改动直接应用到更早提交
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一个 fixup 改动从分支尖端向上游移动融合到目标提交

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文「tip of the iceberg」节：Linux inotify、并行钩子、远程组 push 等
information_blocks.visual_idea: 多个小特性卡片：Linux 监控、并行钩子、lane-limit、format-rev

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文全文：100+ 贡献者、33 位新人
information_blocks.visual_idea: Git 2.55 版本标识，社区贡献活跃

main_metaphor: 冰山分层：MIDX 增量重打包是水面下的基建优化，git history fixup 和命令行改进是水面上的用户体验更新
primary_subject: 一个分层结构：底层是 pack 和 MIDX 的存储引擎层，上层是 git history、hooks、log 等命令层
subject_action: 底层 pack 存储优化和上层命令体验改进同时推进
composition: 自下而上的分层结构：存储引擎优化（MIDX）→ 工作流改进（fixup）→ 命令体验更新（多项小特性）→ Git 2.55 标识
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: post-apocalyptic wasteland illustration, weathered materials, dusty atmosphere, survival objects, desaturated contrast
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，从 40 项风格池随机选中（#26）；废土风格的"重建与修复"意象呼应 Git 版本迭代中修复问题和重构基础设施的主题
style_safety_note: 清单风格为泛类型描述，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻
draft_goal: 验证分层结构（存储→工作流→命令→版本标识）的叙事可读性
revision_targets: 废土风格与版本发布主题的契合
小特性卡片的数量与布局
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide infographic-story cover illustration. Theme: Git 2.55 release highlights — from storage engine optimization to daily command improvements. Summary angle: A full-stack update from low-level pack management to user-facing command experience. Narrative flow: layered reveal. Information blocks: Step — Incremental MIDX layers in the bottom section, large stable deeper layers and frequently updated tip layers, labeled with 2x speed improvement. Step — git history fixup feature in the middle, a change flowing upward to merge into an earlier commit. Step — Multiple small feature cards above: Linux inotify, parallel hooks, lane-limit, format-rev. Takeaway — Git 2.55 identifier at the top with 100+ contributors count. Main metaphor: An iceberg layered structure — infrastructure optimization at the bottom, user experience updates at the top. Subject: A layered structure representing storage engine, workflow improvements, and command updates. Composition: Bottom-up layers: MIDX storage optimization → fixup workflow → command features → Git 2.55 label. Style/medium: combine product-poster style illustration with post-apocalyptic wasteland illustration, weathered materials, dusty atmosphere, survival objects, desaturated contrast. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist. Color palette: gray-brown, dark orange, faded blue, light sand. Visible text policy: allow only 4 short labels or number chips. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI, no fake terminals.
